title: WALPURGISNACHT
subtitle: Asylum Ward C · the last shift
epigraph_upright: The end that makes a beginning, the threshold honored, the page turned cleanly.
epigraph_reversed: The vigil that goes on too long, the ward that won't close.
scene_description: The corridor is empty except for you. The five rooms are quiet. The cupola has a missing pane. Something's about to enter.
direction_hint: You walk the rounds. Each round is the last one or it isn't.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Asylum Ward C · the last shift.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
